data.title: Dogecoin Follows Bitcoin's $100K Flourish With 9% Rally As Bullish Predictions Rise, But Here's What You Should Know
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) rallied sharply Wednesday night following cryptocurrency market bellwether Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) climb to $100,000.

data.title: Trump Eyes Shyam Sankar For Pentagon Role While Palantir Gains From Border Crisis Contracts — Analyst Says, 'This Is A Win For The Stock'
data.description: Palantir Technologies has emerged as a pivotal player in government technology and artificial intelligence, with its influence expanding from controversial immigration enforcement to potential Pentagon leadership.

data.title: Jim Cramer Says Google Could Be In Hot Water As Trump Taps Gail Slater For Antitrust Position: 'Not A Friend Of Big Tech'
data.description: Jim Cramer raised concerns over Gail Slater's appointment as Trump's antitrust chief, highlighting her tough stance on Big Tech, which signals potential challenges for companies like Google amid the DOJ's ongoing crackdown on monopolistic practices.

data.title: Happy Bitcoin $100K Day: Here's How Nayib Bukele, Brian Armstrong, And Peter Schiff Reacted To The Historic Milestone
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), some sixteen years after its inception as a lesser-known decentralized digital money, is now worth over $100,000. Yes, you heard it right!

data.title: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Strategy Drives MicroStrategy's 490% Surge, Hedge Fund CIO Says It's An 'Extreme Example' Of Volatility Monetization
